meta_description: Risperdone是否會導致性功能障礙？ - [url=https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10039643/]https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10039643/[/url]  剛剛查了資料...

discussions.content: 會的。題主引用的那篇論文裡也明說了"Risperidone is one such antipsychotic with high reported rates of sexual dysfunction".
